  1. Today’s Activities

Lessons > 9. Variable Scope & More on Modules

In today’s lecture, we are going to go over:

  1. Modules: a way of organizing and reusing code, and
  2. Variable scope: what parts of memory can your program access at any given time?

Then we’ll start reviewing content for Quiz 1. Make sure to visit the Quiz 1 page for more details.

Today's Activities

1. Download the Exercise Files

    Skim sections 12.1 through 12.4.
